title: Binding Enchantment
description: Adds an enchantment that keeps the item after death (like keep inventory)
body:
**Binding** is a custom enchantment added by this datapack that lets you keep specific items after death — no need to enable full keepInventory. When an item enchanted with Binding is in your inventory and you die, that item stays with you instead of dropping on the ground.

This makes it perfect for tools, weapons, or any valuable gear you never want to lose in lava or to mobs.

## ⚙️ Features
- 🧲 Adds a new enchantment: Binding
  
- 🪦 On death, items (with the enchantment) will stay in your inventory
  
- ⚙️ Works with any enchantable item
  
- 👥 Multiplayer-compatible
  
- 🎒 Doesn’t require keepInventory to be enabled
  
- 🪶 Lightweight
